title: [lichen_l2.c:1155] rx_ctx.current_time hardcoded to 0
description: Function: lichen_l2_input. Precondition: The rx_ctx.current_time is hardcoded to 0 (line 1159). If lichen_link_rx() uses this for epoch validation or time-based replay protection, the value 0 would be incorrect. Need to verify what lichen_link_rx() does with current_time. If it's optional/unused, this is fine. If it's used for epoch checking, this is a security issue (time-based replay attacks possible). Priority 2 pending review of link.h contract for current_time field.
close_reason: Fixed: Added comment explaining that current_time is reserved for future time-based replay aging but not currently used. The replay protection uses sliding window with monotonic access_counter, not wall-clock time. Setting to 0 is safe because lichen_link_rx() does not read this field.
